home.step1Body: Edit {{file}} to see changes. Press {{key}} to open developer tools.
home.step2Body: Tap the Explore tab to learn more about what's included in this starter app.
home.step3Body: When you're ready, run {{cmd}} to get a fresh {{appDir}} directory. This will move the current {{appDir}} to {{exampleDir}}.

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: This app includes example code to help you get started.
explore.fileRoutingBody1: This app has two screens: {{file1}} and {{file2}}
explore.fileRoutingBody2: The layout file in {{layoutFile}} sets up the tab navigator.
explore.platformSupportBody: You can open this project on Android, iOS, and the web. To open the web version, press {{key}} in the terminal running this project.
explore.imagesBody: For static images, you can use the {{suffix2x}} and {{suffix3x}} suffixes to provide files for different screen densities
explore.darkModeBody: This template has light and dark mode support. The {{hook}} hook lets you inspect what the user's current color scheme is, and so you can adjust UI colors accordingly.
explore.animationsBody: This template includes an example of an animated component. The {{component}} component uses the powerful {{library}} library to create a waving hand animation.
explore.animationsIosBody: The {{component}} component provides a parallax effect for the header image.
